---
title: "STAT 184 — Homework [N]"
author: "Your Name Here"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    code-line-numbers: true
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
editor: source
---

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
# Style guide followed: [Tidyverse / Google / BOAST — pick one]
```

# Question 1

## Part (a)

Write your prose answer here.

```{r q1a}
# Your code here
```

## Part (b)

```{r q1b}
# Your code here
```

# Question 2

```{r q2}
# Your code here
```

# AI Use Note

*One or two sentences. Examples:*

- *"Did not use AI on this assignment."*
- *"Used Claude to help debug a `pivot_wider` call in Question 3. Did not use AI elsewhere."*
- *"Used Copilot autocomplete while writing the dplyr chain in Question 2."*

# Code Appendix

```{r codeAppend, ref.label=knitr::all_labels(), echo=TRUE, eval=FALSE}
```
